title: OCS/GCS qconf parallel environment schema
description: Schema describing the JSON produced and consumed by qconf -fmt json -sp / -Mp: a parallel environment definition.

slots.description: Total number of slots available to the parallel environment.

user_lists.description: Access lists allowed to use the parallel environment.

xuser_lists.description: Access lists denied use of the parallel environment.

start_proc_args.description: Startup command line, or the empty string for NONE.

stop_proc_args.description: Shutdown command line, or the empty string for NONE.

allocation_rule.description: Slot allocation rule: a special token ($pe_slots, $fill_up, $round_robin) or a fixed integer slot count.

control_slaves.description: Whether OCS/GCS generates and controls the slave tasks.

job_is_first_task.description: Whether the job script itself counts as one of the requested slots.

urgency_slots.description: Slot count assumed for urgency/resource computation: a method token (min, max, avg) or a fixed integer.

accounting_summary.description: Whether a single accounting record is written for the whole parallel job.

ign_sreq_on_mhost.description: Whether slave resource requests are ignored on the master host.

master_forks_slaves.description: Whether the master task forks the slave tasks.

daemon_forks_slaves.description: Whether a daemon forks the slave tasks.
